name: Talk to your apps / AI workspace / connected SaaS stack
description: Creators are showing how AI can connect scattered SaaS context and turn it into useful answers or workflows.
product_relevance: The product is directly aligned because it connects apps so users can ask questions across their stack and turn answers into workflows.
why_now: Teams adopted many SaaS tools, AI expectations are rising, and creators are moving from generic ChatGPT tips to practical workflow demos.
